problem: 晶圓廠停機成本極高，業務連續性需要架構級保障。
problem_en: Fab downtime costs are extremely high; business continuity requires architecture-level assurance.
problem_zh-Hans: 晶圆厂停机成本极高，业务连续性需要架构级保障。
scope: 異地溫備援機房選址、網絡設計與基礎設施建置；2×HGX B300關鍵推理備援節點（確保AI決策在DR期間維持）；異步複製架構設計，涵蓋MES數據、Historian、Lakehouse；SD-WAN雙ISP廣域鏈路冗餘；DR季度演練計劃與SLA文件
scope_en: Off-site warm-standby data center site selection, network design, and infrastructure build-out; 2×HGX B300 critical inference failover nodes (ensuring AI decisions are maintained during DR); async-replication architecture design covering MES data, Historian, and Lakehouse; SD-WAN dual-ISP WAN link redundancy; DR quarterly drill plan and SLA documentation
scope_zh-Hans: 异地温备援机房选址、网络设计与基础设施建置；2×HGX B300关键推理备援节点（确保AI决策在DR期间维持）；异步复制架构设计，涵盖MES数据、Historian、Lakehouse；SD-WAN双ISP广域链路冗余；DR季度演练计划与SLA文件
keySpecs: 備援架構（溫備援跨區域 · SD-WAN雙ISP）
keySpecs_en: Resilience Architecture (Warm Standby Cross-Region · SD-WAN Dual-ISP)
keySpecs_zh-Hans: 备援架构（温备援跨区域 · SD-WAN双ISP）
